safetyNote: Draft seeding must preserve existing image refs unless an approved replacement asset ref is provided.
transferSafetyRule: Codefy OS never writes to Sanity. It only prepares media outputs.

entries.recommendedVisual: Enterprise planning dashboard showing routes, schedules, booking demand, service requirements, and pricing visibility in one view.
entries.recommendedPurpose: Support the enterprise planning and control tab with a concrete buyer-side operations screen.

alt.en: Enterprise planning dashboard showing schedules, demand, and service control.
alt.ar: لوحة تخطيط للشركة تعرض الجداول والطلب والتحكم في الخدمة.

entries.notes: Current published homePage has no image on the matching feature tab path. Approved homepage.v1 includes this tab and should receive an explicit image ref before final draft seeding.
entries.sourceTruth: Faithful marketing recreation of real Tranzkit enterprise planning workflows based on schedule_calendar_screen and client_booking_dashboard patterns already present in the product.
entries.assetMethodNote: Use a recreated mockup because the feature image slot is prominent and raw planning screens are likely too dense for the first website release unless heavily simplified. Keep routes, schedules, bookings, suppliers, pricing visibility, and service control aligned with real product capabilities.

entries.recommendedVisual: Operator execution dashboard with assignments, trips, drivers, vehicles, live status, and QR or field execution context.
entries.recommendedPurpose: Support the operator execution and field operations tab with an execution-focused control screen.

alt.en: Operator execution workspace showing schedule assignments, drivers, vehicles, and field status.
alt.ar: مساحة تشغيل للمشغل تعرض التعيينات والسائقين والمركبات وحالة التنفيذ الميداني.

entries.notes: No current image ref is present. Live tracking or QR execution should be represented inside this tab image because the approved homepage.v1 map does not add separate tab image slots for those topics.
entries.sourceTruth: Faithful marketing recreation of real Tranzkit operator execution workflows based on driver_assignments_screen, live_trips_screen, and related assignment flows in the repo.
entries.assetMethodNote: Use a recreated mockup because the feature slot needs a clean operator story with assignments, trips, drivers, vehicles, and QR-aware field execution, and the raw product view may need a more curated composition for launch.

entries.recommendedPurpose: Show planning, bookings, supplier setup, route demand, and schedule control.

alt.en: Enterprise planning dashboard with bookings, utilization, and service setup.
alt.ar: لوحة تخطيط للشركة تعرض الحجوزات والاستغلال وتجهيز الخدمة.

entries.notes: Maps to the approved Home page slot: Enterprise planning dashboard.
entries.sourceTruth: Real Tranzkit client_booking_dashboard or schedule_calendar_screen capture with demo-safe data and tuned filters, tabs, and row density.
entries.assetMethodNote: Start with a real screenshot and tune the app state first. This asset should stay visibly product-authentic as long as the dashboard is populated with safe demo bookings, schedules, and utilization data.
entries.captureNotes: Raw cropped schedules capture saved from Sales Management -> Routes & Schedules -> Schedules.

entries.recommendedPurpose: Show assignments, drivers, vehicles, trips, suppliers, and live service follow-up.

alt.en: Operator control dashboard with live trip execution and assignment readiness.
alt.ar: لوحة تحكم للمشغل تعرض تنفيذ الرحلات وجاهزية التعيينات.

entries.notes: Maps to the approved Home page slot: Operator control dashboard.
entries.sourceTruth: Real Tranzkit tranzkit_operations_dashboard_screen or live_trips_screen capture with demo-safe execution metrics and cleaned view state.
entries.assetMethodNote: Use a tuned screenshot because the operations dashboard already maps well to the website claim if the KPI, chart, and table state is cleaned and populated with demo-safe execution data.
entries.captureNotes: Links and Assignments exposed phone numbers in the reachable Associations state. Tuned screenshot was rejected and this asset now moves to Figma rebuild.

entries.recommendedPurpose: Show invoices, payment status, utilization insights, and pricing visibility.

alt.en: Finance dashboard showing receivables, payables, cash flow, and profitability visibility.
alt.ar: لوحة مالية تعرض الذمم المدينة والدائنة والتدفق النقدي ورؤية الربحية.

entries.notes: Maps to the approved Home page slot: Finance and pricing visibility.
entries.sourceTruth: Real Tranzkit tranzkit_finance_dashboard_screen capture with demo-safe AR/AP, payment status, and profitability data.
entries.assetMethodNote: Use a tuned screenshot because the finance dashboard is already a strong proof surface, but it must be scrubbed to demo-safe values and simplified for readability.

entries.recommendedVisual: Driver mobile or field execution screen.
entries.recommendedPurpose: Show driver app workflows, QR route support, live trip follow-up, and field readiness tasks.

alt.en: Field operations view showing live trips, driver activity, and QR-supported workflows.
alt.ar: واجهة عمليات ميدانية تعرض الرحلات الحية ونشاط السائقين وسير العمل المدعوم برموز QR.

entries.notes: Maps to the approved Home page slot: Driver and field workflows.
entries.sourceTruth: Faithful marketing recreation grounded in real Tranzkit live_trips_screen, live-tracking flows, QR-supported attendance concepts, and driver workflow capabilities in the codebase.
entries.assetMethodNote: Prefer a recreated mockup for the first release unless a polished real driver-mobile capture is available. The current repo evidence is stronger for live trips and tracking than for a website-ready mobile shot, so a faithful Figma mobile-style composition is safer.

entries.recommendedPurpose: Optional supporting screen for maintenance readiness, incidents, and operational preparation.

alt.en: Fleet readiness view showing maintenance tasks, vehicle status, and accident follow-up.
alt.ar: واجهة جاهزية الأسطول تعرض مهام الصيانة وحالة المركبات ومتابعة الحوادث.

entries.notes: Optional screenshot slot requested in the media plan. Not currently present in homepage.v1 content map, so this remains planning-only until the content map is expanded.
entries.sourceTruth: Real Tranzkit owned_fleet_screen maintenance and accident-report workflows with demo-safe vehicle and readiness data.
entries.assetMethodNote: Use a tuned screenshot because fleet readiness is already represented by real maintenance and accident-report sections in the product, but it needs cleaner demo data and careful cropping.

entries.recommendedVisual: Live tracking or operations map view.
entries.recommendedPurpose: Optional supporting screen for real-time trip status and control-room monitoring.

alt.en: Live tracking view showing trip status, route context, and current vehicle tracking.
alt.ar: واجهة تتبع حي تعرض حالة الرحلة وسياق المسار وتتبع المركبة الحالي.

entries.notes: Optional screenshot slot requested in the media plan. Not currently present in homepage.v1 content map, so this remains planning-only until the content map is expanded.
entries.sourceTruth: Real Tranzkit live-tracking flow with sensitive identifiers removed and demo-safe telemetry state only.
entries.assetMethodNote: Use a tuned screenshot because the underlying capability is real, but the capture must be sanitized to remove tokens, URLs, and exact location details before marketing use.
entries.captureNotes: Replaced the earlier crop with a new capture taken from the current live Trip Analysis view. This version keeps the map and analytics together, removes the identifying trip header, and trims the right and bottom whitespace.

entries.recommendedVisual: Approved customer, partner, or operator logos prepared as Sanity image assets.
entries.recommendedPurpose: Support trust and adoption proof on the Home page logo bar.

alt.en: Logo bar reserved for approved demo partner or customer logos.
alt.ar: شريط شعارات مخصص لشعارات شركاء أو عملاء تجريبية معتمدة.

entries.notes: Current published logoBar.logos[] is empty. Preserve the empty array unless approved logo assets are prepared.
entries.sourceTruth: Approved demo-safe logo strip only; no client-identifying live data should be sourced from production.
entries.assetMethodNote: Treat the logo bar as a designed marketing asset, not a captured product screenshot. Use only approved demo-safe or placeholder brand marks.

entries.recommendedVisual: A branded 1200x630 social card combining enterprise planning, operator control, and financial visibility cues with Tranzkit styling.
entries.recommendedPurpose: Social sharing and preview image for the Home page.

alt.en: Tranzkit home social card showing planning, operations, and finance visibility.
alt.ar: بطاقة مشاركة للصفحة الرئيسية تعرض التخطيط والتشغيل والرؤية المالية في ترانزكيت.

entries.notes: Current published homePage document has no seo.ogImage. This should be added only when an approved asset ref is available.
entries.sourceTruth: Composite card built from real Tranzkit planning, operations, and finance workflows and the approved homepage messaging scope.
entries.assetMethodNote: Design this as a Figma social card for launch. It can combine multiple truthful product fragments, but it must not introduce unsupported features or invented workflows.

mediaQualityRule.guidance: Tune app state before recreating in Figma. Recreated mockups must stay faithful to real Tranzkit capabilities and approved scope.

mediaLanguagePolicy.currentRule: One image asset in Sanity, bilingual CMS text around it, and bilingual alt text in the media plan.
rules: Use a single shared media asset by default for English and Arabic pages.
Do not create separate English and Arabic images unless the asset contains large embedded text or truly needs RTL-specific layout treatment.
Avoid large English or Arabic text baked into images.
If a Figma frame needs text, keep it minimal and brand-neutral, such as the Tranzkit logo only.
If an asset ever becomes locale_specific_required, do not move it to ready_for_transfer until website-side localized image support or an approved workaround exists.
